x-enumeration-literals.name: Marketing Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Responsible for creating, implementing, and managing the campaign.
Includes roles like marketing managers, content creators, graphic designers, and social media specialists

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Aligns with marketing efforts to ensure the campaign drives sales.
Provides feedback on lead quality and customer interactions

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Development Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures that the products or services being promoted are ready and meet customer needs.
Provides insights into product features and benefits to highlight in the campaign.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Support Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Handles inquiries and feedback from customers generated by the campaign.
Offers insights into customer issues and satisfaction levels.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Analyst
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Analyze campaign performance data and provide actionable insights.
Measure KPIs, track metrics, and suggest optimizations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance and Legal Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures that the campaign complies with legal and regulatory requirements.
Reviews content for compliance with advertising standards and data privacy laws.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Finance Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Manages the campaign budget and ensures financial resources are allocated efficiently.
Tracks expenses and measures return on investment (ROI).

x-enumeration-literals.name: External Partner and Vendor
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Third-party providers that offer specialized services such as email marketing platforms, CRM systems, and analytics tools.
Collaborate with the internal team to execute the campaign smoothly.
